Rift+ // Hanbot AIO

Play cleaner with Rift+

Champion-specific Hanbot scripts with tuned combos, safer casts, farm logic, drawings, and menus you can understand fast.

Browse championsWhy Rift+

18

Champions

10

Full menus

8

Routed

Made for players

Open, tune, play

Every full-menu card expands into the same practical controls players see in game.

Why Rift+

Less generic automation, more champion logic

Rift+ is built around real champion patterns: pressure windows, manual control, safe commits, visible drawings, and configurable menus.

Safer casts

Turret checks, HP gates, spell shields, stasis blocks, enemy counts, and reserve rules reduce blind commits.

Champion identity

Zed plays around shadows, Caitlyn around traps, Gangplank around barrels, Yasuo around Q3 and Wind Wall.

Readable menus

Settings are split by combo, harass, clear, killsteal, safety, drawings, and debug so tuning is quick.

Core settings

Prediction and cast gates

Prediction engine selection, hitchance, collision, windwall, spell lock, and cast timing controls for skillshot champions.

Champion-specific combos

Full-menu champions expose kit-specific combo planners such as Zed R commit, Caitlyn trap chains, Gangplank barrels, Samira style, Yasuo advanced routes, and Zyra plant combos.

Reactive defense

Anti-gap, interrupt, evade, cleanse, Wind Wall, Blade Whirl, Kayle saves, Ahri Charm peel, and Caitlyn trap responses are separated from normal combo logic.

Farm, harass, and killsteal

Lane clear, jungle clear, last-hit, poke mana gates, and lethal checks are surfaced separately so users can tune risk by mode.

Drawings and diagnostics

Range circles, damage overlays, passive or style state, generated row summaries, and throttled debug probes make behavior inspectable without claiming unsupported menus.

Champions

Pick your script

Each champion card gives the short version first. Open it to scan grouped settings, then expand only the menu group you care about.

Full menu

Assassin

Zed

Full Hanbot menu surface for prediction, shadow combos, R commit, harass, killsteal, clear, safety, reactive logic, evade, matchups, drawings, and debug.

predictionkeyscomboR commitharass
Open full menu›

Prediction / Targeting

Zed uses prediction and target filters before committing shadows, Q lines, and R follow-ups.

4 items

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction route used for Q and shadow line checks. Change it when moving targets are overpredicted or underpredicted.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Q hit chance

    Required confidence before casting Razor Shuriken. Raise it for safer casts, lower it for more pressure.

    slider3

  • Shadow Q line check

    Requires Q lines from Zed or shadows to pass before firing. Disable only if prediction is too conservative.

    toggletrue

  • Collision check

    Blocks Q casts that prediction says will collide. Turn it off only when collision data is unreliable.

    toggletrue

Keys / Manual

Manual inputs expose Zed specific holds for combo, harass, flee, and shadow control.

9 items

  • Enable Zed logic

    Turns all Rift+ Zed casts and drawings on or off. Disable it when you want Hanbot to load without champion automation.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction backend used by skillshots. Change it if your current prediction feels too strict or too loose.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Combo key

    Manual combo fallback when orbwalker mode detection is unavailable. Adjust it to match your Hanbot hotkeys.

    keybindSpace

  • Harass key

    Manual poke fallback. Bind it to the key you hold for short trades.

    keybindC

  • Clear key

    Manual farm fallback for lane and jungle logic. Match this to your farming key.

    keybindV

  • Last-hit key

    Manual last-hit fallback for conservative minion securing. Use it when you want spell CS only.

    keybindX

  • Flee key

    Escape mode key. Use it to route movement and defensive spells toward the cursor.

    keybindZ

  • Manual shadow key

    Casts or uses shadow routes toward the cursor. Bind it to a key you can hold during outplays.

    keybindT

  • Manual R key

    Forces the R commit route on the selected target. Use it when you want to decide the all-in yourself.

    keybindG

Combo

Main combat planner for W, E, Q, and shadow routes before a possible ultimate commit.

5 items

  • Use Q in combo

    Allows combo Q casts from Zed and shadows. Disable if you only want auto attacks and E in short trades.

    toggletrue

  • Use W in combo

    Allows Living Shadow setup in combo. Disable it when you want to save W for escape.

    toggletrue

  • Use E in combo

    Allows Shadow Slash when targets are in range of Zed or shadows. Turn it off for mana saving.

    toggletrue

  • Prefer shadow line

    Looks for better Q angles from shadows before casting. Keep enabled for burst accuracy.

    toggletrue

  • Combo min energy

    Minimum energy required before full combo. Raise it to avoid starting fights without enough follow-up.

    slider40

R Commit

Death Mark logic gates when Zed should enter, follow, or hold the ultimate.

5 items

  • Use R in combo

    Allows automatic Death Mark when damage and safety checks pass. Disable if you want manual R only.

    toggletrue

  • R only if killable

    Requires the target to be killable after the R sequence. Turn it off for engage oriented play.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve W after R

    Keeps shadow resources available after R when possible. Enable for safer exits.

    toggletrue

  • No R into turret

    Blocks R commits that end under dangerous turret positions. Disable only for deliberate dives.

    toggletrue

  • R damage margin

    Extra damage buffer before committing R. Raise it when shields or heals often deny kills.

    slider10

Harass

Poke settings for Q and shadow pressure without spending full all-in resources.

3 items

  • Use Q in harass

    Allows Q poke during harass. Disable if you want to farm only.

    toggletrue

  • Use W harass

    Allows W setup for longer poke. Turn it off to preserve shadow cooldown.

    togglefalse

  • Harass mana or energy hold

    Minimum resource percent for poke. Raise it to preserve energy for fights.

    slider55

Killsteal

Lethal checks for Q, E, ignite style finishers, and R follow-up when damage is enough.

3 items

  • Use Q killsteal

    Casts Q if the target can be finished. Disable if you want no automatic snipes.

    toggletrue

  • Use E killsteal

    Uses E from Zed or shadow if it can secure a kill. Turn off to avoid short range commits.

    toggletrue

  • Use R killsteal

    Allows R as a lethal finisher. Keep off if you want ultimate reserved for manual calls.

    togglefalse

Clear

Lane and jungle settings for Q, E, and shadow assisted farming.

4 items

  • Use Q lane clear

    Uses Q through minion lines. Disable to last hit manually.

    toggletrue

  • Use E lane clear

    Uses E when nearby minions can be hit. Turn off to save energy.

    toggletrue

  • Use spells in jungle

    Allows Q and E on neutral camps. Disable when holding cooldowns for invades.

    toggletrue

  • Clear min hits

    Minimum minions hit before spending a spell. Raise it for stricter waveclear.

    slider3

Safety

Checks that prevent unsafe shadow, ultimate, and dive routes.

3 items

  • Avoid turret end positions

    Blocks routes that appear to end under enemy turret. Keep enabled for normal play.

    toggletrue

  • Avoid low health commits

    Stops aggressive casts when Zed is too low. Disable only for high-risk execute attempts.

    toggletrue

  • Minimum HP to commit

    Health percent required before all-in routes can run. Raise it for safer fights.

    slider35

Reactive

Automatic responses to enemy movement, gapclosers, and interrupt windows.

3 items

  • Use E against melee divers

    Casts E when melee threats enter range. Disable if it wastes energy in lane.

    toggletrue

  • React to dash end

    Aims spells at the predicted dash endpoint. Keep enabled against mobile champions.

    toggletrue

  • Interrupt dangerous casts

    Allows reactive damage on interruptible spells when a row is enabled. Disable if it fires too often.

    toggletrue

Evade

Movement and shadow use around incoming threats.

2 items

  • Use shadows defensively

    Allows shadow movement for escape patterns. Turn it off if you want no automatic displacement.

    toggletrue

  • Evade danger threshold

    Minimum danger score before defensive routes trigger. Raise it to reduce reactions.

    slider3

Matchups

Per-enemy rows and special handling for champions that change Zed commit rules.

2 items

  • Enable matchup rows

    Shows generated enemy rows when runtime data is available. Use them to disable problem matchups individually.

    toggletrue

  • Print generated row summary

    Prints which enemy rows were built. Enable when checking whether an enemy spell was detected.

    togglefalse

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

8 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Draw shadow positions

    Shows tracked shadow positions and return options. Disable if the screen is cluttered.

    toggletrue

Debug / Probes

Optional logs and runtime probes for users tuning prediction, generated rows, or callback behavior.

5 items

  • Enable debug logs

    Enables throttled Rift+ Zed debug output. Keep it off unless you are diagnosing blocked casts.

    togglefalse

  • Debug prediction

    Logs prediction accepts and rejects. Use it when a skillshot is not casting when expected.

    togglefalse

  • Debug casts

    Logs cast attempts and block reasons. Use it to see whether mana, range, safety, or cooldown stopped a cast.

    togglefalse

  • Print block reasons

    Prints the current reason a spell family is blocked. Enable briefly while tuning menus.

    togglefalse

  • Throttle ms

    Limits how often repeated debug lines print. Raise it if the console is noisy.

    slider500
Full menu

Marksman

Samira

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q, W, E, R, style state, drawings, and debug probes.

QWERstyle
Open full menu›

Core / Keys / Style

Global Samira mode keys, prediction, spell lock, and style state display.

9 items

  • Enable Samira logic

    Turns all Rift+ Samira casts and drawings on or off. Disable it when you want Hanbot to load without champion automation.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction backend used by skillshots. Change it if your current prediction feels too strict or too loose.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Combo key

    Manual combo fallback when orbwalker mode detection is unavailable. Adjust it to match your Hanbot hotkeys.

    keybindSpace

  • Harass key

    Manual poke fallback. Bind it to the key you hold for short trades.

    keybindC

  • Clear key

    Manual farm fallback for lane and jungle logic. Match this to your farming key.

    keybindV

  • Last-hit key

    Manual last-hit fallback for conservative minion securing. Use it when you want spell CS only.

    keybindX

  • Flee key

    Escape mode key. Use it to route movement and defensive spells toward the cursor.

    keybindZ

  • Spell lock ms

    Short anti-spam delay after casts. Raise it if sequences double-cast.

    slider120

  • Display RiftPlus state only

    Shows WBUFF, RBUFF, LASTE, and sequence state without changing behavior. Use it to understand combo flow.

    displaytrue

Q / Flair

Melee and ranged Q, harass, killsteal, farm, manual Q Flash, and prediction.

18 items

  • Combo: use Q

    Allows Q during combat. Disable if you want E and autos to build style first.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: allow close Q

    Allows short-range Q when the target is close. Keep enabled for melee Flair.

    toggletrue

  • Hold Q for ready W+E style route

    Delays Q when W plus E can improve style sequencing. Disable for faster Q casts.

    toggletrue

  • Max Q range

    Maximum Q range. Lower it if long Q casts miss too often.

    slider900

  • Harass: use Q

    Allows Q poke during harass. Disable to conserve mana.

    toggletrue

  • Auto Q key

    Manual auto Q key. Bind it for quick poke outside normal modes.

    keybindG

  • Kill: use Q

    Uses Q when it can finish a target. Disable for no automatic killsteal.

    toggletrue

  • Farm mode enabled

    Allows Q farm routes when farm key is active. Disable for manual wave control.

    toggletrue

  • Clear key: attack enemy first

    Prioritizes enemy harass before farm Q when valid. Disable for CS focus.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear Q

    Uses Q for lane clear. Turn off to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear bullet Q

    Allows long Q line farm mode. Disable if it misses minion lines.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear short-sector Q

    Allows close cone Q farm mode. Keep enabled for nearby waves.

    toggletrue

  • Last-hit Q

    Uses Q to secure minions. Disable for manual last-hitting.

    toggletrue

  • Lane Q hits >=

    Minimum minions hit before lane Q. Raise it for efficiency.

    slider3

  • Manual Q

    Manual Q key. Bind it for user controlled casts.

    keybindT

  • Q Flash

    Casts Q then delayed Flash if Flash slot is found. Use only if you want this advanced route.

    keybindG

  • Q Flash delay ms

    Delay between Q and Flash. Tune if the combo fires too early or late.

    slider200

  • Accurate prediction

    Requires accurate Q prediction. Disable for more aggressive Q attempts.

    toggletrue

W / Blade Whirl

Combat, harass, kill, clear, and projectile block controls.

15 items

  • Combo: use W

    Allows W during combat. Disable if you want W reserved for blocking.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: use W before E

    Uses W before E for a style route. Enable if you want faster style stacking.

    togglefalse

  • Combo W at style >=

    Minimum style before combo W. Raise it to save W for S setup.

    slider5

  • Harass: use W

    Allows W in harass. Disable to preserve defensive W.

    toggletrue

  • Harass W at style >=

    Minimum style before harass W. Raise it for conservative use.

    slider5

  • Kill: use W

    Uses W if it can finish a target. Disable for defensive W only.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear W

    Allows W on lane minions. Default off to preserve cooldown.

    togglefalse

  • Lane W hits >=

    Minimum minions hit before clear W. Raise it to avoid waste.

    slider3

  • Jungle W

    Allows W on jungle camps. Disable if saving W for blocks.

    toggletrue

  • Enable W block

    Allows projectile and spell block routes. Keep enabled for Samira defense.

    toggletrue

  • Targeted spell rows

    Enables targeted spell block rows. Disable if targeted rows are too broad.

    toggletrue

  • Skillshot rows

    Enables skillshot block rows. Keep runtime rows tuned per matchup.

    toggletrue

  • Missile/basic-attack consumer

    Uses missile cache to block dangerous incoming attacks. Disable if it blocks too often.

    toggletrue

  • Ranged attacks

    Allows W against ranged attacks when HP gate passes. Disable for spell-only blocks.

    toggletrue

  • Ranged AA post-hit HP <= %

    Only blocks ranged autos that would leave Samira below this HP. Raise it for more blocks.

    slider30

E / Wild Rush

Gapclose, ally and minion anchors, E+Q follow-up, harass, kill, flee, safety, and blacklist.

20 items

  • Combo: use E

    Allows E during combo. Disable if you want manual dashes only.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: gapclose on minions

    Uses enemy minions as E anchors to reach targets. Keep enabled for chase routes.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: gapclose on ally minions

    Uses allied minions as E anchors. Disable if pathing feels unsafe.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: gapclose on ally heroes

    Uses allied heroes as E anchors. Keep enabled for repositioning.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: cast Q after E

    Uses E plus Q follow-up. Keep enabled for style and damage.

    toggletrue

  • Minimum style

    Minimum style before combo E. Zero means no style gate.

    slider0

  • Do not E below HP %

    Blocks E when Samira is below this HP. Raise it for safety.

    slider0

  • Do not E into enemies >=

    Blocks E endpoints with too many enemies. Lower it for safer dashes.

    slider3

  • Harass: use E

    Allows E in harass. Default off because E commits position.

    togglefalse

  • Kill: use E

    Uses E to finish targets. Disable to avoid risky execute dashes.

    toggletrue

  • Kill: use E+Q if needed

    Adds Q after E for lethal checks. Keep enabled for finish combos.

    toggletrue

  • Kill: E return after risky E

    Attempts return route after risky kill E. Keep enabled for safer cleanup.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle E

    Allows E on jungle camps. Disable for cooldown preservation.

    toggletrue

  • Flee: use E

    Uses E for escape anchors. Keep enabled for mobility.

    toggletrue

  • Flee: avoid turret endpoint

    Blocks flee E endpoints under turret danger. Keep enabled.

    toggletrue

  • Auto E out within 5s after kill

    Uses E to exit after a recent champion kill. Disable if you want manual resets.

    toggletrue

  • Do not E into turret

    Blocks dangerous turret endpoints. Keep enabled for safety.

    toggletrue

  • Do not E into wall

    Blocks endpoints inside walls. Keep enabled unless navmesh data is wrong.

    toggletrue

  • Endpoint enemy check range

    Radius used to count enemies near the E endpoint. Raise it for stricter safety.

    slider600

  • Manual E

    Manual E key. Bind it for user-selected dashes.

    keybindN

R / Inferno Trigger

Combo R, kill R, S-style legality, and Fast S routes.

8 items

  • Combo: use R

    Allows Inferno Trigger in combo. Disable for manual R only.

    toggletrue

  • Require S style

    Requires legal S style before R. Keep enabled because R cannot fire otherwise.

    toggletrue

  • Require target in R range

    Only casts R when a target is in range. Disable only for diagnostics.

    toggletrue

  • Kill: use R

    Uses R if it can finish a target. Disable for no automatic execute.

    toggletrue

  • R damage ticks to count

    Number of R ticks used in kill damage estimates. Lower for conservative estimates.

    slider5

  • Fast S key

    Manual key for Fast S sequence. Bind only if you want advanced style routing.

    keybindA

  • Fast S hit mode

    Selects Fast S hit mode. Adjust based on how aggressively you want to stack style.

    slider2

  • Fast S Flash-AA if native Flash ready

    Allows Flash auto route when Flash is detected. Disable if you never want Flash used.

    toggletrue

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

10 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Draw style/progress

    Shows Samira style progress. Keep enabled to see R readiness.

    toggletrue

  • Draw passive target mark

    Marks passive targets from particle evidence. Disable if it clutters target visuals.

    toggletrue

  • Draw keys/state

    Shows key and state rows. Enable when learning the menu.

    togglefalse

Debug / Probes

Optional logs and runtime probes for users tuning prediction, generated rows, or callback behavior.

5 items

  • Enable debug logs

    Enables throttled Rift+ Samira debug output. Keep it off unless you are diagnosing blocked casts.

    togglefalse

  • Debug prediction

    Logs prediction accepts and rejects. Use it when a skillshot is not casting when expected.

    togglefalse

  • Debug casts

    Logs cast attempts and block reasons. Use it to see whether mana, range, safety, or cooldown stopped a cast.

    togglefalse

  • Print block reasons

    Prints the current reason a spell family is blocked. Enable briefly while tuning menus.

    togglefalse

  • Throttle ms

    Limits how often repeated debug lines print. Raise it if the console is noisy.

    slider500

Jinx

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q weapon switching, W Zap, E chompers, R rocket executes, and drawings.

QWERdraw
Open full menu›

Core / Keys

Global Jinx switches, prediction engine, spell lock, and mode fallback keys.

8 items

  • Enable Jinx logic

    Turns all Rift+ Jinx casts and drawings on or off. Disable it when you want Hanbot to load without champion automation.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction backend used by skillshots. Change it if your current prediction feels too strict or too loose.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Combo key

    Manual combo fallback when orbwalker mode detection is unavailable. Adjust it to match your Hanbot hotkeys.

    keybindSpace

  • Harass key

    Manual poke fallback. Bind it to the key you hold for short trades.

    keybindC

  • Clear key

    Manual farm fallback for lane and jungle logic. Match this to your farming key.

    keybindV

  • Last-hit key

    Manual last-hit fallback for conservative minion securing. Use it when you want spell CS only.

    keybindX

  • Flee key

    Escape mode key. Use it to route movement and defensive spells toward the cursor.

    keybindZ

  • Spell lock ms

    Delay between casts. Raise it if spells fire too close together.

    slider160

Q / Switcheroo

Rocket and minigun switching for combat, harass, lane clear, jungle, and last-hit modes.

14 items

  • Disable every Q usage

    Blocks all automatic Q switching. Enable if you want to control rockets manually.

    togglefalse

  • Combat: switch Q

    Allows Q form switching during combat. Disable for manual weapon control.

    toggletrue

  • Intelligent switching

    Uses rockets only for range or enemy clusters. Keep enabled for ammo and DPS efficiency.

    toggletrue

  • AOE use

    Allows rocket splash logic for grouped enemies. Enable when teamfighting often.

    togglefalse

  • Harass: switch Q

    Allows rocket poke in harass. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Mana % >=

    Minimum mana for harass Q. Raise it to preserve W and E.

    slider50

  • Farm toggle

    Toggles farm Q behavior. Turn it off when you want minigun only.

    keybindA

  • Switch to minigun if farm is OFF

    Forces minigun when farm Q is disabled. Keep enabled for predictable farming.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: switch Q

    Allows rockets in lane clear. Disable for mana conservation.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle: switch Q

    Allows rockets on jungle camps. Disable if minigun is preferred.

    toggletrue

  • Drop rocket if farm is close

    Switches back to minigun when close enough. Keep enabled for mana saving.

    toggletrue

  • Use if can hit minions >=

    Minimum minions hit before rocket clear. Raise it for stricter splash use.

    slider3

  • Lane clear: use Q if last hittable

    Uses Q when it can secure a minion. Disable if you prefer autos only.

    toggletrue

  • Last-hit mode: switch Q

    Allows Q switching in last-hit mode. Turn off for minigun last-hits only.

    toggletrue

W / Zap

Range, accurate prediction, combo, harass, kill, jungle, and manual Zap controls.

9 items

  • Max use range

    Maximum W cast range. Lower it if long Zap casts miss too often.

    slider1450

  • Slow / accurate prediction

    Requires stricter prediction for W. Disable if Jinx holds W too much.

    toggletrue

  • Combat: use W

    Allows W in combat. Disable if you only want autos and rockets.

    toggletrue

  • Only if no enemies in AA range

    Skips W when auto attacks are available. Keep enabled for DPS efficiency.

    toggletrue

  • Harass: use W

    Allows W poke. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Harass mana % >=

    Minimum mana for harass W. Raise it in mana hungry lanes.

    slider50

  • Kill W

    Casts W if it can finish a target. Disable for no auto killsteal.

    toggletrue

  • Use W

    Allows W on jungle camps. Turn off for faster auto-focused clears.

    toggletrue

  • Manual W

    Manual Zap key. Bind it when you want semi-auto control.

    keybindT

E / Flame Chompers

Trap logic for CC, channels, teleports, objects, anti-gap rows, and manual casts.

11 items

  • Accurate prediction

    Uses stricter trap prediction. Disable if traps are placed too late.

    toggletrue

  • Use on CC target

    Places chompers on already controlled enemies. Keep enabled for reliable chain CC.

    toggletrue

  • Use on channel target

    Uses E on channeling enemies. Keep enabled against channels.

    toggletrue

  • Use on teleport target

    Places traps on teleport positions. Disable if traps are wasted on low-value teleports.

    toggletrue

  • Use on stasis/revive objects

    Places traps on tracked stasis or revive locations. Keep enabled for guaranteed follow-up.

    toggletrue

  • Use E

    Enables anti-gap E. Disable if traps are being wasted on dash reactions.

    toggletrue

  • Ignore under-turret

    Skips anti-gap when Jinx is under enemy turret. Keep off if you still want defense during dives.

    togglefalse

  • Only if gapcloses to me

    Requires the dash endpoint to be near Jinx. Enable for stricter anti-gap.

    togglefalse

  • Trigger range

    Distance around Jinx for anti-gap trap checks. Lower it for later reactions.

    slider600

  • Manual E

    Manual chompers key. Use it for user selected trap casts.

    keybindZ

  • Semi-E Key

    Semi-auto E key on selected or best target. Bind it for quick trap attempts.

    keybindG

R / Super Mega Death Rocket

Long-range execute and manual rocket controls.

7 items

  • Kill R

    Allows R lethal casts. Disable if you want manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

  • Max use range

    Maximum R killsteal range. Lower it if long snipes are too unreliable.

    slider2500

  • Fallback target HP <= %

    HP threshold used when damage library has no exact value. Lower it for safer ultimates.

    slider25

  • Slow / accurate prediction

    Uses stricter R prediction. Disable for more aggressive rockets.

    toggletrue

  • Do not R if allies near target

    Blocks R when allies are close enough to finish instead. Disable if you still want snipes.

    toggletrue

  • Manual R

    Manual rocket key. Bind it for user controlled casts.

    keybindA

  • Semi-R Key

    Semi-auto rocket on selected target. Use it for guided snipes.

    keybindT

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

9 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Use colorful Q circle

    Draws Q range with a distinct color. Disable for simpler range circles.

    toggletrue

  • Draw keys

    Shows key and toggle state on screen. Enable if you forget current farming state.

    togglefalse
Routed

Marksman

Kaisa

Kaisa is included in the current Hanbot loader and can be selected as part of the Rift+ lineup. Full menu details will be shown when that champion menu is ready for players.

Kaisa is loaded by the current Hanbot suite. Full menu details are not shown until the exact in-game menu surface is verified.

Full menu

Marksman

Zeri

Full Hanbot menu surface for passive, Q, W, E, R, wall routes, drawings, and display-only parity rows.

passiveQWER
Open full menu›

Core / Mode Priority

Global Zeri mode enables, prediction, manual wall jump, and display-only holds.

10 items

  • Enable Zeri logic

    Master switch for Zeri behavior. Disable it for drawings without casts.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects prediction for Q and W. Change it if shots miss moving targets.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Enable combo

    Runs Q, W, E, and R scheduler in combo mode. Disable for manual combat.

    toggletrue

  • Enable harass

    Runs Q and W poke while respecting reserve controls. Disable for farm-only play.

    toggletrue

  • Enable lane clear

    Runs lane clear with Q and passive. Disable to freeze.

    toggletrue

  • Enable jungle clear

    Allows Q and W on jungle camps. Disable to save cooldowns.

    toggletrue

  • Enable last-hit

    Uses Q and passive execute checks for minions. Disable for manual CS.

    toggletrue

  • Wall Jump Key

    Moves to a wall route and casts E to the paired endpoint when close. Bind for manual wall jumps.

    keybindJ

  • Low mana hold %

    Display-only hold row retained for parity. It does not change behavior in the current source.

    display15

  • Spell lock guard ms

    Display-only spell lock row retained for parity. It does not change behavior in the current source.

    display120

Passive / Living Battery

Champion autos, plant attacks, ward timing, and passive reserve display.

4 items

  • Use AA on champions

    Allows passive auto attacks on champions. Disable if you want spell-only harassment.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve passive near enemies

    Display-only row. The implemented passive reserve behavior lives under Q Farm.

    displayfalse

  • Attack Plants

    Allows attacks on plants. Enable if you want automation to use plant interactions.

    togglefalse

  • Do not instantly attack newly placed wards

    Adds a delay before attacking fresh wards. Enable to avoid suspicious instant ward attacks.

    togglefalse

Q / Burst Fire

Combo, auto Q, R extension, double Q warning, harass, farm, freeze, panic clear, and prediction.

20 items

  • Use Q combo

    Primary Zeri DPS cast in combo. Disable for manual Q only.

    toggletrue

  • Auto Q toggle

    Independent Auto Q toggle. Bind it if you want Q firing outside normal mode states.

    keybindG

  • Q combo hitchance

    Prediction score required for combo Q. Raise it for stricter aim.

    slider1

  • Q after attack cadence

    Fires Q after attacks in combo cadence. Keep enabled for smooth DPS.

    toggletrue

  • Try Q Minion to Extend R

    Casts Q through a minion line while Lightning Crash is active or recent. Enable for R chain extension.

    toggletrue

  • Use logic checks

    Requires minion line and collision checks before Q R extension. Keep enabled for safety.

    toggletrue

  • Use double Q combo

    Enables risky double Q behavior. Leave disabled unless you understand the account risk warning.

    togglefalse

  • Bug Double Q for Combo

    Hold to use double Q route and release to stop. Keep unbound if you do not use it.

    keybindUnbound

  • Use Q harass

    Uses Q poke in harass mode. Disable to conserve attention and mana.

    toggletrue

  • Q harass hitchance

    Prediction score for harass Q. Raise it for safer poke.

    slider3

  • Use Q lane clear

    Uses Q on lane minions when gates pass. Disable to freeze.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q jungle

    Uses Q on neutral monsters. Disable if saving cooldowns.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q last-hit

    Uses Q to secure low-health minions. Keep enabled for CS support.

    toggletrue

  • Last hit when harass

    Allows last-hit routing during harass. Disable if harass should ignore minions.

    toggletrue

  • Freeze Lane Mode Key

    Tightens last-hit thresholds while held. Use it to hold a wave.

    keybindLMB

  • Panic Clear Mode Key

    Forces lane clear mode while held. Use it when you need to shove quickly.

    keybindLMB

  • Use Q to last hit when pushing turret

    Allows Q last-hits under turret push logic. Enable if turret CS is missed.

    togglefalse

  • Reserve Full Passive AA Only for Last Hit

    Holds full passive autos for last-hits. Enable for precise farming.

    togglefalse

  • Use prediction

    Uses prediction when available. Keep enabled for moving targets.

    toggletrue

  • Respect collision fallback

    Keeps Q conservative when collision support is uncertain. Disable only if overblocked.

    toggletrue

W / Ultrashock Laser

Direct W, wall laser, harass, terrain probe, auto W, glide E follow-up, and semi W.

20 items

  • Use W combo

    Casts W in combo with Rift+ gates. Disable for Q-only DPS.

    toggletrue

  • W direct range

    Maximum direct W range. Lower it if long shots miss.

    slider1150

  • W combo hitchance

    Prediction score required for W. Raise it for stricter lasers.

    slider3

  • Disable W if Enemy in Q Range

    Skips W when Q can already hit. Enable for DPS efficiency.

    togglefalse

  • Use W when wall exists

    Allows terrain laser W if a wall line exists. Enable for long wall snipes.

    togglefalse

  • Use W when no wall

    Allows direct W without terrain. Keep enabled for normal W casts.

    toggletrue

  • Try wall laser

    Prefers terrain W when available. Disable if wall scans are unreliable.

    toggletrue

  • Use only wall laser

    Skips direct W and only uses terrain W. Enable for long-range poke style.

    togglefalse

  • Wall mode

    Chooses whether terrain W or direct W gets first pass. Change based on preferred laser route.

    dropdownWall first

  • Require W prediction check

    Keeps W conservative when prediction is uncertain. Disable for more attempts.

    toggletrue

  • Use W harass

    Uses W poke in harass. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • W harass range

    Maximum harass W range. Lower it if distant poke misses.

    slider2000

  • Enable W terrain probe

    Tests terrain lines for extended laser hits. Keep enabled for wall laser feature.

    toggletrue

  • Wall scan steps

    Number of points tested for terrain candidates. Raise for more accuracy, lower for less work.

    slider5

  • W terrain range

    Maximum extended terrain W range. Lower it for nearby wall lasers only.

    slider2700

  • Always try terrain W

    Tries wall laser whenever a target can be hit through terrain logic. Disable for direct-first W.

    toggletrue

  • Auto W on notmove

    Uses W on immobile targets. Keep enabled for free hits.

    toggletrue

  • Auto W When Enemy is CC'd

    Uses W on crowd-controlled targets. Keep enabled for reliable damage.

    toggletrue

  • E while gliding using W

    Follows W with E glide when available. Disable if W should not trigger movement.

    toggletrue

  • Semi-W

    Manual W cast while held. Bind it for user controlled lasers.

    keybindUnbound

E / Spark Surge

Auto dash, wall jump, turret endpoint, and blacklist controls.

4 items

  • Auto E Dash

    Responds to enemy dashes unless blacklisted. Enable if you want reactive repositioning.

    togglefalse

  • When E end go to turret pos

    Moves to allied turret anchors after known wall-jump endpoints. Keep enabled for safer wall routes.

    toggletrue

  • E Wall Jump

    Moves to a wall route and casts E to a paired endpoint. Bind for manual wall jump execution.

    keybindZ

  • Dash Black List

    Per-enemy dash blacklist rows. Disable rows for targets you do not want Zeri to dash around.

    displaytrue

R / Lightning Crash

Combo R, hit gates, range hold, and semi-manual ultimate.

5 items

  • Use R combo

    Casts R in close all-in or teamfight when hit gates pass. Disable for manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

  • Use R when hitable >= X(0=Off)

    Minimum enemy count before R fires. Set to zero to disable the count gate.

    slider3

  • Disable if R can't hit

    Blocks R unless hit gate passes. Enable for stricter ultimate use.

    togglefalse

  • Prevent Moving Out of R Range

    Holds movement or casts R when movement would leave Lightning Crash range. Keep enabled for uptime.

    toggletrue

  • Semi-R

    Manual R cast while held. Bind it for user controlled ultimates.

    keybindUnbound

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

12 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Show E Predicted Landing Point

    Draws last E landing point or wall jump endpoint. Keep enabled for wall route learning.

    toggletrue

  • Show Only on Key Press

    Shows E landing draw only while wall jump key is held. Enable for cleaner visuals.

    togglefalse

  • Show R Remaining Time

    Displays R range and cooldown reminder near Zeri. Keep enabled during all-ins.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage to heroes

    Shows hero damage estimates. Enable if you want kill planning overlays.

    togglefalse

  • Draw damage to jungle

    Shows jungle damage estimates. Enable for objective tracking.

    togglefalse

  • Draw damage to minions

    Shows minion damage estimates. Keep enabled for CS support.

    toggletrue

  • AA Coil Style

    Draws the auto attack coil style range. Disable for simpler visuals.

    toggletrue
Routed
