Mage Assassin

Ahri

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q, W, E, R, prediction, passive, manual keys, drawings, and debug probes.

QWERprediction
Open full menu›

Core / Prediction / Passive

Global Ahri switches plus passive tracking and prediction engine selection.

5 items

  • Enable Ahri logic

    Master switch for Ahri automation. Disable it when you want drawings or Hanbot loaded without casts.

    toggletrue

  • Use orbwalker mode dispatch

    Reads combo, harass, clear, and last-hit modes from orbwalker state. Turn off if you prefer manual keys.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction Engine

    Selects the prediction backend for Q, E, and R positioning. Change it when skillshots feel inaccurate.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Track passive probe

    Tracks Essence Theft state for logic and display. Enable if you want passive status shown and considered.

    toggletrue

  • Draw passive status

    Shows passive status on screen. Turn it off if you do not need healing state feedback.

    toggletrue

Q / Orb of Deception

Double-pass Q poke, clear, killsteal, and return-line movement helpers.

18 items

  • Use Q in combo

    Casts Q in combo when prediction passes. Disable if you want Charm-first or W-only trades.

    toggletrue

  • Q combo min hitchance

    Minimum prediction score for combo Q. Raise it for safer lines.

    slider2

  • Prefer Q after Charm

    Waits for Charm setup when possible. Keep it on for higher burst reliability.

    toggletrue

  • Q double-hit weight

    Prioritizes lines that can hit both outgoing and return Q. Raise it if you want fewer single-pass pokes.

    slider2

  • Use Q in harass

    Allows Q poke in harass mode. Disable to conserve mana.

    toggletrue

  • Q harass min mana %

    Minimum mana before harass Q. Raise it when you need mana for Charm or escape.

    slider45

  • Only harass on double-hit line

    Restricts harass Q to lines with return potential. Disable for more frequent poke.

    togglefalse

  • Use Q in lane clear

    Uses Q through waves. Disable if you want manual wave control.

    toggletrue

  • Q clear min minions

    Minimum minions hit by Q before casting in clear. Raise it for efficiency.

    slider3

  • Q clear min mana %

    Minimum mana for Q waveclear. Raise it to preserve combat mana.

    slider55

  • Use Q on jungle

    Allows Q on jungle camps. Turn it off when saving cooldowns for fights.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q to last hit

    Permits expensive Q last-hits. Leave off if you only want low-cost CS tools.

    togglefalse

  • Use Q killsteal

    Casts Q when damage can secure a kill. Disable if you want no automatic finishers.

    toggletrue

  • Use prediction for Q

    Uses predicted target movement for Q instead of current position. Keep enabled for moving targets.

    toggletrue

  • Q return magnet movement

    Moves to improve Q return hit angle. Disable if you do not want movement assistance.

    toggletrue

  • Q magnet combo only

    Limits return movement to combo mode. Turn off if you also want it in harass.

    toggletrue

  • Q return line width

    Width used to evaluate return-pass hits. Adjust if return logic feels too strict or too loose.

    slider120

  • Debug Q prediction

    Logs Q prediction blocks when debug is enabled. Use it only while tuning.

    togglefalse

W / Fox-Fire

Close-range burst, chase speed, flee speed, clear, last-hit, and reservation controls.

12 items

  • Use W in combo

    Uses Fox-Fire during close combat burst. Disable if you want to save mana or avoid wave hits.

    toggletrue

  • W after AA or in range

    Delays W until an attack window or close range is useful. Keep enabled for cleaner trades.

    toggletrue

  • Use W in harass

    Allows short-range W poke. Disable against lanes where stepping close is unsafe.

    toggletrue

  • W harass min mana %

    Minimum mana before W poke. Raise it to preserve Charm and ultimate options.

    slider50

  • Use W to chase

    Uses W movement speed while chasing. Disable if it causes unwanted forward movement.

    toggletrue

  • Use W while fleeing

    Uses W speed while the flee key is held. Keep enabled for escape help.

    toggletrue

  • Use W in lane clear

    Allows W missiles for waveclear. Disable if you want to reserve W for champions.

    togglefalse

  • Only W clear under tower

    Restricts W clear to turret farming. Enable for conservative lane control.

    toggletrue

  • Use W on jungle

    Allows W on jungle camps. Turn off if conserving mana.

    toggletrue

  • Use W to last hit

    Uses W for nearby CS. Disable if W often hits the wrong minion.

    togglefalse

  • Use W killsteal

    Casts W when close damage can finish a target. Disable to prevent automatic close commits.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve W for flee

    Keeps W available when escape pressure exists. Keep enabled if you value safety over damage.

    toggletrue

E / Charm

Pick, interrupt, anti-gap, peel, killsteal, and reservation logic for Charm.

15 items

  • Use E in combo

    Casts Charm during combo when prediction passes. Disable for manual Charm only.

    toggletrue

  • E combo min hitchance

    Minimum prediction score for Charm. Raise it if E misses too often.

    slider3

  • Enable E pick

    Allows long-range Charm attempts on high-value targets. Disable for safer, combo-only E.

    toggletrue

  • Prioritize high-value targets

    Biases pick logic toward carries and dangerous enemies. Turn off for nearest-target behavior.

    toggletrue

  • Use E in harass

    Allows Charm in harass mode. Default off because Charm is a high-value cooldown.

    togglefalse

  • Use E killsteal

    Uses Charm if it can secure a kill or enable lethal follow-up. Disable if you reserve E defensively.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve E for interrupt

    Holds Charm for interruptible enemy casts. Keep enabled against channel champions.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve E for anti-gap

    Preserves Charm when dash threats are near. Disable for more aggressive trading.

    toggletrue

  • Enable E interrupts

    Allows generated interrupt rows to cast E. Turn it off if reactions are unwanted.

    toggletrue

  • E interrupt min danger

    Minimum spell danger before interrupting. Raise it to save Charm for only major threats.

    slider3

  • Enable E anti-gap

    Casts Charm against incoming dashes when rows allow it. Keep enabled against divers.

    toggletrue

  • Cast E at dash end

    Aims Charm at the dash endpoint. Disable if endpoint prediction is unreliable.

    toggletrue

  • Anti-gap trigger range

    Distance around Ahri that can trigger anti-gap Charm. Lower it for later reactions.

    slider650

  • Use E vs melee divers

    Uses Charm as personal peel against melee threats. Disable if it fires too early.

    toggletrue

  • Ally peel probe only

    Shows ally peel evidence without enabling unsupported automatic ally peel. Leave it as display unless runtime evidence is added.

    displaytrue

R / Spirit Rush

Ultimate reposition, chase, flee, evade, charge reservation, and killsteal logic.

15 items

  • Use R in combo

    Allows Spirit Rush reposition during combo. Disable for manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

  • Combo R only secure kill

    Requires a likely kill before combo R. Turn off for engage or angle creation.

    toggletrue

  • R secure kill margin

    Damage buffer required before using R to secure. Raise it against shields and heals.

    slider10

  • Use R1 gapclose if follow-up kills

    Allows first dash to close distance only when follow-up damage can finish. Keep enabled for safer commits.

    toggletrue

  • Allow R engage

    Permits R for non-lethal engage angles. Disable for conservative play.

    togglefalse

  • R to angle Charm

    Uses R to create a better Charm line. Disable if you prefer direct spell casts only.

    toggletrue

  • R align Q return

    Uses R positioning to improve Q return hit. Turn off if movement assistance feels intrusive.

    toggletrue

  • Use R to chase

    Uses Spirit Rush to keep targets in range. Disable if you overchase.

    toggletrue

  • Use R on flee key

    Allows R dashes while fleeing. Keep enabled for escape safety.

    toggletrue

  • R evade probe

    Shows or tests R evade rows without forcing unsupported claims. Use only for diagnostics.

    togglefalse

  • Enable R evade rows

    Allows spell-owned evade rows when generated. Disable if automatic dashes are unwanted.

    togglefalse

  • Track R recast window

    Tracks remaining Spirit Rush charges and recast time. Keep enabled for charge-aware logic.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve last R charge for escape

    Blocks spending the final charge aggressively. Turn off only for all-in play.

    toggletrue

  • No R into turret

    Prevents ultimate dashes toward turret danger. Keep enabled unless deliberately diving.

    toggletrue

  • Use R killsteal

    Allows R as an execute tool. Default off to avoid wasting ultimate charges.

    togglefalse

Flee / Manual Keys

Direct controls for escape and forced spell casts.

3 items

  • Flee key

    Moves toward cursor and enables flee spell logic. Set it to your preferred escape key.

    keybindZ

  • Manual E key

    Casts Charm manually toward the selected target or cursor route. Use it when you want full control.

    keybindT

  • Manual R mouse key

    Casts R toward mouse position when legal. Bind it only if you want manual dash control.

    keybindG

Per-Enemy Root

Generated display and blacklist rows for enemy specific reactions.

2 items

  • Enable per-enemy generated display

    Shows generated enemy rows for blacklists and reactions. Disable for a shorter menu.

    toggletrue

  • Print generated row summary

    Prints generated row counts. Use it to confirm runtime rows were created.

    togglefalse

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

9 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Draw killable HP overlay

    Shows targets that appear killable by current spell damage. Turn off if health bars get too busy.

    toggletrue

  • Draw passive text

    Shows passive state text. Disable if you do not need Essence Theft feedback.

    toggletrue

Debug / Probes

Optional logs and runtime probes for users tuning prediction, generated rows, or callback behavior.

5 items

  • Enable debug logs

    Enables throttled Rift+ Ahri debug output. Keep it off unless you are diagnosing blocked casts.

    togglefalse

  • Debug prediction

    Logs prediction accepts and rejects. Use it when a skillshot is not casting when expected.

    togglefalse

  • Debug casts

    Logs cast attempts and block reasons. Use it to see whether mana, range, safety, or cooldown stopped a cast.

    togglefalse

  • Print block reasons

    Prints the current reason a spell family is blocked. Enable briefly while tuning menus.

    togglefalse

  • Throttle ms

    Limits how often repeated debug lines print. Raise it if the console is noisy.

    slider500
Full menu

Skirmisher

Yasuo

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q, W Wind Wall, E, R, advanced combos, harass, clear, drawings, and debug probes.

QWWind WallER
Open full menu›

Core

Global Yasuo safety, prediction, dash stacking, and advanced route prerequisites.

8 items

  • Language / Idioma

    Selects menu language. Change it only if you will reload twice so submenu labels rebuild.

    dropdownEnglish

  • Safe mode: turret/endpos gates

    Blocks E, R, and Flash routes when dash end or target area looks unsafe. Keep enabled for normal play.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects prediction engine for Q and tornado routes. Change it if Q3 aim feels wrong.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Stack Q When Dash

    Allows EQ spin to stack Q in combo, clear, and advanced routes. Disable if you want less automatic dashing.

    toggletrue

  • Suppress repeated debug spam

    Reduces repeated diagnostic output. Keep enabled unless debugging a single route.

    toggletrue

  • Advanced routes require R ready

    Blocks Airblade, Beyblade, and Keyblade style routes unless R is ready. Keep enabled for real combo value.

    toggletrue

  • Preserve best escape E target

    Avoids consuming the best escape dash target for low-value routes. Keep enabled for safety.

    toggletrue

  • Combat In Turret override

    Allows combat despite turret checks. Enable only for deliberate dives.

    togglefalse

Keys / Manual

Manual bridge keys for advanced Yasuo sequences.

3 items

  • EQ Flash / Beyblade

    Manual EQ Flash route key. Bind it only if you want advanced user-triggered engages.

    keybindG

  • Keyblade

    Manual Keyblade sequence key. Use it when you want full combo control.

    keybindT

  • Hold key E > Q > E enabled

    Harass bridge key that dashes in, casts Q, and returns by E when safe. Bind for controlled poke routes.

    keybindC

Q / Steel Tempest

Combat Q1, Q2, tornado, harass, clear, killsteal, and interrupt settings.

9 items

  • Combat: Use Q1/Q2

    Uses normal Q during combat. Disable if you only want tornado or manual Q.

    toggletrue

  • Combat: Use Q3 tornado

    Uses tornado in combat when prediction passes. Disable for manual tornado only.

    toggletrue

  • Q combo hitchance

    Prediction score for Q and tornado. Raise it if casts miss moving targets.

    slider2

  • Use Q harass

    Allows Q poke in harass mode. Disable to preserve lane position.

    toggletrue

  • Wait after E before Q ms

    Delay before Q after dashing. Tune if EQ casts too early or late.

    slider120

  • Wait after Q before return E ms

    Delay before returning after E-Q-E poke. Increase if return happens too early.

    slider180

  • E-Q-E endpos enemy count <=

    Maximum enemies allowed near the final position. Lower it for safer harass.

    slider1

  • Clear: Use Q

    Uses Q for lane and jungle clear. Disable for manual farming.

    toggletrue

  • Killsteal Q

    Uses Q when it can finish a target. Disable for no automatic execute.

    toggletrue

W / Wind Wall

Projectile, missile, attack, spell-row, and probe driven Wind Wall defense.

7 items

  • Use Wind Wall

    Allows W to block dangerous spells and attacks. Keep enabled for defensive value.

    toggletrue

  • Targeted spell rows

    Enables generated targeted spell block rows. Disable if a matchup should be manual.

    toggletrue

  • Skillshot rows

    Enables generated skillshot block rows. Tune rows per enemy spell.

    toggletrue

  • Probe missiles / W block

    Logs missile and wall block candidates. Use only while diagnosing missed blocks.

    togglefalse

  • Probe non-hero missiles

    Includes non-hero missiles in probes. Enable only if you need object-name evidence.

    togglefalse

  • Ranged attacks

    Allows wall against selected ranged attacks. Disable if W is wasted on autos.

    toggletrue

  • Ranged AA post-hit HP <= %

    Only wall ranged autos that would leave Yasuo below this HP. Raise it for more protection.

    slider30

E / Sweeping Blade

Dash combat, gapclose, evade, harass bridge, clear, target locks, and endpoint safety.

8 items

  • Combat: Use E

    Allows E dashes in combat. Disable for Q-only combat.

    toggletrue

  • Gapclose on minions

    Uses minions to reach champions. Keep enabled for Yasuo mobility.

    toggletrue

  • E endpoint enemy count <=

    Maximum enemies allowed near dash end. Lower it for safer dashes.

    slider2

  • Avoid turret endpoint

    Blocks E dashes ending under turret danger. Keep enabled for safety.

    toggletrue

  • Use E evade

    Allows E to dodge using valid dash targets. Disable if you want no reactive movement.

    toggletrue

  • Use E harass bridge

    Allows E-Q-E poke route while holding the bridge key. Disable for no auto return poke.

    toggletrue

  • Clear: Use E

    Uses E in lane or jungle clear. Disable for conservative wave management.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E locked targets

    Shows targets that cannot be dashed again yet. Keep enabled while learning E locks.

    toggletrue

R / Last Breath

Auto R, airborne target selection, advanced combos, and killsteal controls.

5 items

  • Always Auto R

    Allows automatic R on airborne targets when gates pass. Disable for manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

  • Airblade/Keyblade require R ready

    Requires R readiness before advanced routes. Keep enabled to avoid wasting setup.

    toggletrue

  • EQ Flash min hit

    Minimum targets hit for EQ Flash route. Raise it for teamfight-only Beyblades.

    slider1

  • Use Keyblade

    Allows Keyblade sequence when manually triggered and safe. Disable if you do not use this combo.

    toggletrue

  • Killsteal R

    Uses R to finish airborne targets when damage is enough. Disable for manual R decisions.

    toggletrue

Advanced Combos

Airblade, Beyblade, Keyblade, and E-Q-E sequence controls.

4 items

  • Auto EQ Flash outside combo

    Allows EQ Flash route outside normal combo. Keep off unless you want aggressive automation.

    togglefalse

  • Use Keyblade

    Enables Keyblade route from the assigned key. Turn off if combo timing is not desired.

    toggletrue

  • Advanced routes require R ready

    Blocks advanced routes without ultimate. Keep enabled for meaningful follow-up.

    toggletrue

  • Hold key E > Q > E enabled

    Enables the harass bridge while held. Disable to prevent automatic return dashes.

    toggletrue

Harass

Q poke and E-Q-E return route settings.

3 items

  • Use Q harass

    Allows Q poke. Disable if you want to farm without trading.

    toggletrue

  • Wait after E before Q ms

    Delay before Q in the E-Q-E route. Tune for server latency.

    slider120

  • E-Q-E endpos enemy count <=

    Maximum enemies at the final return point. Lower it for safer poke.

    slider1

Clear / Killsteal

Lane clear, jungle clear, Q stacking, and lethal spell checks.

5 items

  • Use Q clear

    Uses Q to clear minions and stack tornado. Disable for manual wave control.

    toggletrue

  • Use E clear

    Uses E through minions during clear. Disable if it moves you too much.

    toggletrue

  • Stack Q When Dash

    Uses EQ to stack Q during clear. Disable for less movement.

    toggletrue

  • Killsteal Q

    Uses Q as execute. Disable for no automatic finishers.

    toggletrue

  • Killsteal R

    Uses R as execute on airborne targets. Disable for manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

10 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Draw only if ready

    Shows ranges only when spells are ready. Enable for cleaner visuals.

    togglefalse

  • Draw Q stack time

    Shows remaining tornado stack time. Keep enabled for Q3 planning.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E locked targets

    Shows targets currently locked from repeat E. Useful for dash planning.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E-Q-E harass route

    Shows the planned poke and return path. Disable if route lines are distracting.

    toggletrue

Debug / Probes

Optional logs and runtime probes for users tuning prediction, generated rows, or callback behavior.

5 items

  • Enable debug logs

    Enables throttled Rift+ Yasuo debug output. Keep it off unless you are diagnosing blocked casts.

    togglefalse

  • Debug prediction

    Logs prediction accepts and rejects. Use it when a skillshot is not casting when expected.

    togglefalse

  • Debug casts

    Logs cast attempts and block reasons. Use it to see whether mana, range, safety, or cooldown stopped a cast.

    togglefalse

  • Print block reasons

    Prints the current reason a spell family is blocked. Enable briefly while tuning menus.

    togglefalse

  • Throttle ms

    Limits how often repeated debug lines print. Raise it if the console is noisy.

    slider500
Full menu

Fighter Mage

Kayle

Full Hanbot menu surface for passive, Q, W, E, R, manual saves, registry rows, drawings, and debug probes.

passiveQWER
Open full menu›

Core / Registry

Kayle mode dispatch, language, prediction, ally priority, and global mana holds.

11 items

  • Language / Idioma

    Selects the menu language. Change it only if you plan to reload Hanbot so labels rebuild.

    dropdownEnglish

  • Enable Kayle logic

    Master switch for all Kayle automation. Disable it when you want drawings without casts.

    toggletrue

  • Enable combo

    Runs Q, E, W, and R combat order in combo mode. Turn off for manual combat.

    toggletrue

  • Enable harass

    Runs Q poke and safe E while reserving defensive spells. Disable for farm-only lanes.

    toggletrue

  • Enable lane clear

    Allows Q and E waveclear with reservation gates. Disable to freeze manually.

    toggletrue

  • Enable jungle clear

    Allows Q and E on large or epic monsters. Turn off when saving cooldowns.

    toggletrue

  • Enable last-hit

    Uses E or Q to secure minions. Disable for manual CS.

    toggletrue

  • Flee key

    Moves toward cursor and enables self W, Q peel, and defensive R checks. Set it to your escape key.

    keybindZ

  • Low mana hold %

    Blocks low-priority Q and W below this mana percent. Raise it when mana matters.

    slider15

  • Prediction engine

    Selects Q prediction backend. Change it if Radiant Blast prediction feels wrong.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Ally save priority

    Chooses how W and R choose between self, lowest HP ally, or carry-biased saves. Adjust for your team role.

    dropdownLowest HP ally

Passive

Kayle form, stacks, range state, and farm safety.

5 items

  • Track passive

    Tracks Kayle form, range, waves, exalted state, and stacks for logic. Keep enabled for level-aware decisions.

    toggletrue

  • Prefer ranged safety

    Uses stricter pre-6 farm safety when enemies are near. Disable for greedier early farming.

    toggletrue

  • Preserve stacks

    Blocks low-value farm when fight pressure is near. Keep enabled to enter fights with better passive state.

    toggletrue

  • Probe passive buffs

    Logs passive buff names for diagnostics. Keep off unless passive state is wrong.

    togglefalse

  • Draw passive status

    Shows form, range, and exalted status. Disable if you already track passive manually.

    toggletrue

Q / Radiant Blast

Slow, shred, combo setup, harass, execute, clear, anti-gap, and prediction controls.

19 items

  • Use Q combo

    Casts Q on predicted targets after reservation gates. Disable for E-focused combat.

    toggletrue

  • Q combo range

    Maximum Q range in combo. Lower it if long Q casts miss too often.

    slider900

  • Q min range

    Avoids point-blank Q unless useful. Lower it if you want close Q trades.

    slider150

  • Q combo hitchance

    Prediction score needed for combo Q. Raise it for safer casts.

    slider2

  • Prefer Q before E

    Uses Q slow and shred before E if the target is not already killable. Keep enabled for burst setup.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q harass

    Casts Q poke when mana and reserve gates pass. Disable to conserve mana.

    toggletrue

  • Q harass mana %

    Minimum mana for Q harass. Raise it when holding W or R is important.

    slider45

  • Hold Q vs all-in

    Saves Q slow when melee or dash threat is near. Keep enabled against divers.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q if lethal

    Attempts Q when damage can kill. Disable for no automatic executes.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q lane clear

    Uses Q through clustered minions. Turn off to freeze.

    toggletrue

  • Q clear min hits

    Minimum minions hit by Q. Raise it to save mana.

    slider3

  • Use Q jungle

    Uses Q on large or epic monsters. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q last-hit

    Uses Q as fallback CS secure when E cannot. Default off because it is costly.

    togglefalse

  • Reserve Q anti-gap

    Holds Q farm or harass for nearby anti-gap threat. Keep enabled against melee pressure.

    toggletrue

  • Enable Q anti-gap

    Uses Q against close melee or dash threats. Keep enabled for peel.

    toggletrue

  • Anti-gap range

    Enemy distance that triggers Q peel. Lower it for later casts.

    slider525

  • Use prediction

    Uses prediction when available, else target position. Keep enabled for moving targets.

    toggletrue

  • Respect collision

    Passes collision into prediction. Disable only if collision data is overblocking.

    toggletrue

  • Debug Q prediction

    Logs Q prediction blocks when debug is enabled. Use only while diagnosing.

    togglefalse

W / Celestial Blessing

Self save, ally save, utility speed, per-ally rows, threat rows, and reservation controls.

15 items

  • Use W self-save

    Casts W on self when HP and threat gates pass. Keep enabled for survival.

    toggletrue

  • Self W HP %

    Self HP threshold for W. Raise it for earlier healing.

    slider45

  • Self W enemy range

    Enemy proximity required for self W. Raise it to consider more enemies dangerous.

    slider700

  • Use W in flee

    Casts W on self while flee key is held. Keep enabled for escape speed.

    toggletrue

  • Use W ally save

    Casts W on low HP allies when danger gates pass. Disable if you want self-only W.

    toggletrue

  • Ally W HP %

    Ally HP threshold for W saves. Raise it to save earlier.

    slider40

  • Ally W range

    Maximum range for ally W. Lower it to avoid pathing toward far allies.

    slider900

  • Ally danger range

    Enemy range near ally required for save. Raise it to treat more fights as dangerous.

    slider750

  • Use W chase

    Uses W speed while chasing after save reserves clear. Disable if it wastes W.

    toggletrue

  • Use W ally flee

    Uses W to help threatened allies escape. Disable for self-focused play.

    toggletrue

  • Use W ally engage

    Uses W to speed an ally engage when no save reserve exists. Disable for defensive W only.

    toggletrue

  • Utility W mana %

    Minimum mana for W utility. Raise it to reserve mana for combat.

    slider45

  • Reserve W self

    Blocks utility W if self-save risk exists. Keep enabled for safety.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve W ally

    Blocks utility W if ally-save risk exists. Keep enabled for team protection.

    toggletrue

  • Reserve W if R down

    Holds W harder when ultimate is unavailable. Keep enabled when R cooldown makes fights risky.

    toggletrue

E / Starfire Spellblade

Attack cadence, execute, farm, and state probe controls.

8 items

  • Use E cadence

    Activates E when target is in range and gates pass. Disable for manual E timing.

    toggletrue

  • Only when attack ready

    Avoids early E when orbwalker says the next attack is unavailable. Keep enabled for clean resets.

    toggletrue

  • E combat range

    Maximum E activation range. Lower it if E fires on edge targets too often.

    slider650

  • Use E execute

    Uses E when auto plus E can kill. Disable for no automatic executes.

    toggletrue

  • E execute HP %

    Target HP threshold for E execute checks. Lower it for stricter finishes.

    slider35

  • Use E lane clear

    Uses E to secure or clear minions. Disable to manage wave manually.

    toggletrue

  • Use E last-hit

    Uses E for last-hitting low-health minions. Keep enabled for CS support.

    toggletrue

  • Use E jungle

    Uses E on jungle camps. Disable if saving cooldowns.

    toggletrue

R / Divine Judgment

Self and ally ultimate saves, lethal checks, and manual controls.

6 items

  • Use R self-save

    Casts R on Kayle when lethal danger is detected. Keep enabled for survival.

    toggletrue

  • Self R HP %

    Self HP threshold for R. Raise it for earlier ultimates.

    slider18

  • Use R ally-save

    Casts R on allies when priority and danger gates pass. Disable for self-only ultimate.

    toggletrue

  • Ally R HP %

    Ally HP threshold for ultimate saves. Raise it to save teammates earlier.

    slider18

  • Reserve R for lethal

    Blocks aggressive R when lethal threat may soon require it. Keep enabled for defensive play.

    toggletrue

  • Manual R key

    Manual ultimate on selected save target. Bind for direct user control.

    keybindT

Manual / Flee

Direct user controls for flee and forced protective casts.

2 items

  • Flee key

    Moves to cursor and enables W self, Q pursuer, and emergency R. Bind it to your escape key.

    keybindZ

  • Manual ally save key

    Forces ally save evaluation on the best target. Use when you want to override automation timing.

    keybindG

Registry / Generated Rows

Per-ally and spell registry rows generated from runtime team and enemy data.

3 items

  • Per Ally W Save

    Lists ally-specific W save permissions. Adjust rows when a teammate should not receive automatic W.

    displaytrue

  • Per Ally W Utility

    Lists ally-specific movement speed permissions. Disable rows for allies that waste W speed.

    displaytrue

  • Threat Spell Toggles

    Generated spell threat rows for W and R saves. Enable only the threats you want Kayle to answer.

    displayfalse

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

8 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Draw passive status

    Shows form, range, and exalted status near Kayle. Disable for less UI.

    toggletrue

Debug / Probes

Optional logs and runtime probes for users tuning prediction, generated rows, or callback behavior.

5 items

  • Enable debug logs

    Enables throttled Rift+ Kayle debug output. Keep it off unless you are diagnosing blocked casts.

    togglefalse

  • Debug prediction

    Logs prediction accepts and rejects. Use it when a skillshot is not casting when expected.

    togglefalse

  • Debug casts

    Logs cast attempts and block reasons. Use it to see whether mana, range, safety, or cooldown stopped a cast.

    togglefalse

  • Print block reasons

    Prints the current reason a spell family is blocked. Enable briefly while tuning menus.

    togglefalse

  • Throttle ms

    Limits how often repeated debug lines print. Raise it if the console is noisy.

    slider500
Full menu

Fighter

Gangplank

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q, W cleanse, E barrels, R, item usage, and drawings.

QWERitems
Open full menu›

Core / Mode Priority / Items

Global Gangplank controls plus prediction and item usage.

9 items

  • Enable Gangplank logic

    Turns all Rift+ Gangplank casts and drawings on or off. Disable it when you want Hanbot to load without champion automation.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction backend used by skillshots. Change it if your current prediction feels too strict or too loose.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Combo key

    Manual combo fallback when orbwalker mode detection is unavailable. Adjust it to match your Hanbot hotkeys.

    keybindSpace

  • Harass key

    Manual poke fallback. Bind it to the key you hold for short trades.

    keybindC

  • Clear key

    Manual farm fallback for lane and jungle logic. Match this to your farming key.

    keybindV

  • Last-hit key

    Manual last-hit fallback for conservative minion securing. Use it when you want spell CS only.

    keybindX

  • Flee key

    Escape mode key. Use it to route movement and defensive spells toward the cursor.

    keybindZ

  • Spell lock ms

    Anti-spam delay after casts. Raise it if barrels or Q fire too quickly.

    slider160

  • Combo: use RiftPlus items

    Allows supported item activations such as Youmuu, Stridebreaker, BotRK, or Cutlass. Disable for spell-only play.

    toggletrue

Q / Parrrley

Direct Q, barrel Q, poke, execute, clear, last-hit, flee, and windwall-aware prediction.

16 items

  • Combo: cast Q

    Allows Q in combat. Disable if you only want barrel setup or autos.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: Q barrel

    Prefers Q on tracked barrels near targets. Keep enabled for barrel combos.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: AA barrel first in AA range

    Uses auto attack on nearby barrels before Q when possible. Disable if you want faster Q detonation.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: Q hero if no barrel

    Casts Q directly on champions when no barrel route exists. Disable for barrel-only combat.

    toggletrue

  • Block Q through Yasuo/Samira wall

    Prevents Q routes through tracked wind walls. Keep enabled for accuracy.

    toggletrue

  • Require hero Q prediction

    Requires stricter prediction for direct Q. Leave off if target-cast Q should be less restricted.

    togglefalse

  • Harass: cast Q

    Allows Q poke. Disable to save mana or passive pressure.

    toggletrue

  • Q harass mana %

    Minimum mana before harass Q. Raise it to preserve barrels and W.

    slider40

  • Killsteal: cast Q

    Uses direct Q when lethal. Disable if you want no automatic finishers.

    toggletrue

  • Killsteal: Q lethal barrel

    Uses Q on a barrel when Q plus barrel damage can kill. Keep enabled for long executes.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: cast Q

    Allows Q for lane minions. Disable to conserve Silver Serpents or mana.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: Q nearby barrel

    Detonates nearby barrels for waveclear. Disable to save barrel charges.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: skip Q if passive AA kills

    Holds Q when passive auto can secure the minion. Keep enabled for efficiency.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle clear: cast Q

    Allows Q on jungle camps. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Last-hit: cast Q

    Uses Q to secure minions. Disable for manual CS only.

    toggletrue

  • Flee: Q barrel

    Detonates barrel during flee routes when useful. Keep enabled for slow zones while escaping.

    toggletrue

W / Remove Scurvy

Health threshold and cleanse category controls.

15 items

  • Auto W HP <= %

    Self health threshold for automatic W. Raise it for earlier oranges.

    slider25

  • HP W only if enemy near

    Requires nearby enemy pressure before health W. Disable if you want W on low HP even while safe.

    toggletrue

  • Nearby enemy range

    Enemy distance used for HP W. Raise it to treat more threats as nearby.

    slider900

  • Auto W cleanse

    Allows W to cleanse selected crowd control categories. Disable for manual oranges only.

    toggletrue

  • SUPPRESSION

    Cleanses suppression when possible. Keep enabled because suppression is high danger.

    toggletrue

  • SILENCE

    Cleanses silence. Disable only if you want to save W during low danger silences.

    toggletrue

  • KNOCKBACK

    Cleanses knockback category when tracked. Keep enabled against displacement threats.

    toggletrue

  • STUN

    Cleanses stuns. Keep enabled for survival.

    toggletrue

  • TAUNT

    Cleanses taunts. Keep enabled against taunt champions.

    toggletrue

  • SNARE

    Cleanses roots and snares. Keep enabled when mobility matters.

    toggletrue

  • BLIND

    Cleanses blind. Default off because blind is often lower danger than hard CC.

    togglefalse

  • ASLEEP

    Cleanses sleep. Keep enabled against sleep setups.

    toggletrue

  • SLOW

    Cleanses slows. Default off to save W for hard CC.

    togglefalse

  • FEAR

    Cleanses fear. Keep enabled against fear champions.

    toggletrue

  • CHARM

    Cleanses charm. Keep enabled against charm champions.

    toggletrue

E / Powder Keg

Barrel setup, delayed chains, triple barrels, gap/flee, killsteal, clear, and prediction gates.

17 items

  • Combo: cast E

    Allows barrel placement in combo. Disable for Q and auto-only trades.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: EQE delayed chain

    Allows delayed barrel chain after Q or auto setup. Keep enabled for extended combos.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: first barrel

    Places the first barrel in combat. Disable if you only want to detonate existing barrels.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: connected barrel

    Places connected barrels toward targets. Keep enabled for chain combos.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: triple barrel

    Allows three-barrel routes when level and stacks permit. Disable for simpler combos.

    toggletrue

  • Triple/chain level >=

    Minimum level before advanced chains. Lower it only if you want earlier risky barrel routes.

    slider13

  • E combo range

    Maximum E placement range in combo. Lower it if barrels are placed too far forward.

    slider1000

  • Harass: cast E

    Allows barrels for poke. Disable to preserve stacks.

    toggletrue

  • Harass chain level >=

    Minimum level for harass chains. Raise it for conservative barrel use.

    slider0

  • Auto gap barrel

    Places barrels for gap or flee support. Keep enabled against divers.

    toggletrue

  • Gap enemy range

    Close enemy distance that triggers gap barrel logic. Lower it for later reactions.

    slider550

  • Killsteal: E barrel setup

    Uses barrel setup when Q plus barrel damage can kill. Disable for direct executes only.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: cast E

    Allows barrel placement for lane clear. Default off for stack preservation.

    togglefalse

  • E clear min minions

    Minimum minions hit before clear E. Raise it to save barrels.

    slider3

  • Lane clear: detonate barrel

    Detonates barrels for waveclear. Disable if holding barrels for champions.

    toggletrue

  • Keep E stacks

    Number of barrel charges to preserve during clear. Raise it for fight readiness.

    slider1

  • Accurate prediction

    Uses stricter placement prediction. Disable if barrel prediction is too slow.

    toggletrue

R / Cannon Barrage

Teamfight, execute, and map-range ultimate controls.

5 items

  • Combo: cast R

    Allows Cannon Barrage during combat when HP or hit gates pass. Disable for manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

  • R range

    Maximum R range considered by logic. Lower it if you only want nearby fights automated.

    slider25000

  • R combo target HP <= %

    Target HP threshold for combo R. Raise it for earlier teamfight ultimates.

    slider30

  • R hit enemies >=

    Minimum enemy count for teamfight R. Raise it for stricter multi-target casts.

    slider2

  • Killsteal: cast R

    Allows R to finish low-health targets. Disable if you save ultimate for teamfights.

    toggletrue

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

7 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Draw barrels

    Shows tracked barrel ranges and links. Disable if barrel visuals clutter the screen.

    toggletrue
Full menu

Marksman

Caitlyn

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q, W traps, E net, R execute, Galeforce usage, and drawings.

QWERGaleforce
Open full menu›

Core / Mode Priority

Global Caitlyn modes, prediction, spell lock, and manual fallback keys.

8 items

  • Enable Caitlyn logic

    Turns all Rift+ Caitlyn casts and drawings on or off. Disable it when you want Hanbot to load without champion automation.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction backend used by skillshots. Change it if your current prediction feels too strict or too loose.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Combo key

    Manual combo fallback when orbwalker mode detection is unavailable. Adjust it to match your Hanbot hotkeys.

    keybindSpace

  • Harass key

    Manual poke fallback. Bind it to the key you hold for short trades.

    keybindC

  • Clear key

    Manual farm fallback for lane and jungle logic. Match this to your farming key.

    keybindV

  • Last-hit key

    Manual last-hit fallback for conservative minion securing. Use it when you want spell CS only.

    keybindX

  • Flee key

    Escape mode key. Use it to route movement and defensive spells toward the cursor.

    keybindZ

  • Spell lock ms

    Anti-spam delay after casts. Raise it if Hanbot double-casts or lower it if casts feel delayed.

    slider160

Q / Piltover Peacemaker

Combat, poke, execute, clear, manual, and strict line prediction controls.

14 items

  • Combo: cast Q

    Allows Q during combo. Disable if you want traps, net, or autos to lead instead.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: Q immobile target

    Casts Q on confirmed immobile targets even without a normal combo target. Keep enabled for free hits.

    toggletrue

  • Combo: always Q

    Allows late-combo Q even without ideal setup. Leave off for conservative DPS.

    togglefalse

  • Do not Q in AA range

    Avoids Q when Caitlyn can auto attack instead. Disable if you prefer spell burst.

    toggletrue

  • Q after E

    Casts Q after net timing windows. Keep enabled for E into Q follow-up.

    toggletrue

  • Q combo range

    Maximum combo Q range. Lower it if long Q casts miss too often.

    slider1200

  • Harass: cast Q

    Allows Q poke in harass. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Q harass mana %

    Minimum mana before harass Q. Raise it for safer lane resource management.

    slider20

  • Save mana for E

    Keeps enough mana for 90 Caliber Net before harass Q. Keep enabled for escape safety.

    toggletrue

  • Killsteal: cast Q

    Casts Q if it can finish a target. Disable for no automatic execute.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: cast Q

    Uses Q through minion lines. Turn off for manual wave control.

    toggletrue

  • Q lane minions hit >=

    Minimum minion hits before lane clear Q. Raise it to save mana.

    slider3

  • Manual Q

    Manual semi-auto Q key. Use it for user-selected casts outside orb modes.

    keybindT

  • Strict Q prediction

    Requires stricter line prediction. Disable if Caitlyn holds Q too often.

    toggletrue

W / Yordle Snap Trap

Trap logic for combos, CC, channels, anti-gap, anti-dash rows, and trapped target priority.

19 items

  • Combo: cast W

    Allows automatic traps during combo. Disable if you want manual trap placement only.

    toggletrue

  • Save W stacks

    Number of trap charges to preserve. Raise it to keep traps for objectives or CC follow-up.

    slider0

  • W cast interval ms

    Minimum time between automatic traps. Raise it if traps are being spent too quickly.

    slider2000

  • W mode

    Chooses predicted trap placement or direct target position. Use target position if prediction is unreliable.

    dropdownPrediction

  • Use target-position fallback

    Falls back to target position when prediction fails. Disable for prediction-only traps.

    toggletrue

  • Self trap if target is close

    Places trap at Caitlyn when the target is very close. Keep enabled against divers.

    toggletrue

  • W after E

    Adds a trap after net timing windows. Enable for E into W chains.

    toggletrue

  • W after E delay ms

    Delay before trap after E. Tune if the trap lands too early or late.

    slider210

  • Trap CC/stasis target

    Places traps on already controlled targets. Keep enabled for reliable follow-up.

    toggletrue

  • Trap teleport

    Traps teleport targets. Disable if it wastes traps on low-value teleports.

    toggletrue

  • Trap interruptible/channel spells

    Uses W on channel spells when rows match. Keep enabled against channels.

    toggletrue

  • Trap incoming dash

    Traps dash endpoints near Caitlyn or allies. Keep enabled against engage champions.

    toggletrue

  • Only if path ends near me

    Restricts anti-gap traps to dashes ending close to Caitlyn. Enable if traps fire too broadly.

    togglefalse

  • Trap named anti-dash spells

    Uses source listed anti-dash spell rows. Disable if a specific matchup row is wrong.

    toggletrue

  • Trap behind turret target

    Uses special turret trap points when detected. Default off because map state can be situational.

    togglefalse

  • Prioritize trapped targets

    Raises attack priority on trapped targets. Enable if you want autos to consume headshot setups.

    togglefalse

  • Manual W target

    Manual trap key for selected target placement. Bind for precise user-controlled traps.

    keybindJ

  • Manual W self

    Manual self trap key. Use it against melee all-ins.

    keybindUnbound

  • Strict W prediction

    Requires circular prediction before trap placement. Disable if traps are too conservative.

    toggletrue

E / 90 Caliber Net

Combo, harass, jungle, anti-gap, flee, manual reverse E, Flash route, blacklist, and prediction.

15 items

  • Combo: cast E

    Allows target-directed E in combo. Disable if you want net reserved for escape.

    toggletrue

  • Do not E into spell line

    Blocks E routes that appear to dash into dangerous lines. Keep enabled for safety.

    toggletrue

  • E combo range

    Maximum combo E range. Lower it to avoid long risky nets.

    slider800

  • Harass: cast E

    Allows E in harass. Disable for conservative lane trading.

    toggletrue

  • E harass mana %

    Minimum mana before harass E. Raise it to preserve defensive net.

    slider20

  • Killsteal: cast E

    Uses E when it can secure a kill. Disable to avoid short-range execute commits.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle clear: cast E

    Allows E on jungle camps. Turn off when saving net for safety.

    toggletrue

  • Use E on incoming dash

    Uses net as anti-gap against incoming dash routes. Keep enabled against engage.

    toggletrue

  • Trigger range

    Dash endpoint range that triggers anti-gap E. Lower it for only close threats.

    slider800

  • Flee: reverse E

    Uses E to move away while fleeing. Keep enabled for escape routes.

    toggletrue

  • Manual E target

    Manual target-directed E key. Use it for user chosen net casts.

    keybindN

  • Reverse E

    Manual reverse net key. Bind it for quick escape movement.

    keybindA

  • E + Flash

    Manual E then Flash route when Flash slot is detected. Use only if you want this advanced input.

    keybindG

  • Enable E blacklist

    Shows and respects target blacklist rows for E. Enable when specific targets should never be netted.

    togglefalse

  • Strict E prediction

    Requires stricter line prediction for E. Disable if E holds too often.

    toggletrue

R / Ace in the Hole

Execute and manual ultimate controls with range and isolation gates.

6 items

  • Killsteal: cast R

    Allows Ace in the Hole on killable targets. Disable if you want manual R only.

    toggletrue

  • R min range

    Avoids wasting R at close range. Lower it if you want more finish attempts.

    slider900

  • Max enemies near Caitlyn

    Blocks R if too many enemies are near Caitlyn. Raise it if you accept riskier casts.

    slider0

  • Target nearby enemies <=

    Requires target isolation before R. Raise it to allow R when allies may block less often.

    slider1

  • Require target on screen

    Only casts R when the target is visible on screen. Enable for more manual awareness.

    togglefalse

  • Manual R

    Manual R on the lowest-health valid target. Bind it for user controlled executes.

    keybindUnbound

Galeforce Usage

Item dash controls from the source Caitlyn surface.

6 items

  • Usage

    Chooses whether Galeforce is always allowed, only paired with E, or never used. Set to never if you do not want item automation.

    dropdownWith E

  • Style

    Chooses mouse-directed or safer dash positioning. Use safe when you want fewer risky dashes.

    dropdownSafe

  • Range

    Chooses short, max, or dynamic dash distance. Dynamic adapts around the target.

    dropdownDynamic

  • Don't dash in X enemies

    Blocks Galeforce if too many enemies are near the dash area. Lower it for safer play.

    slider3

  • Dash range around target

    Distance used for safe-style dashing around the target. Tune for spacing preference.

    slider500

  • Don't dash into turret

    Blocks item dashes into turret danger when detected. Keep enabled unless deliberately diving.

    toggletrue

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

13 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Damage draw: R only

    Limits damage overlay to ultimate damage. Enable if full damage bars are noisy.

    togglefalse

  • Draw R kill text

    Shows text when R appears lethal. Disable if kill text is distracting.

    toggletrue

  • Draw tracked traps

    Shows trap object tracking. Enable when checking trap state.

    togglefalse

  • Draw passive/headshot bar

    Shows Headshot progress. Disable if you already track it from the game UI.

    toggletrue

  • Passive bar X offset

    Horizontal offset for the passive bar. Adjust to avoid overlapping other UI.

    slider0

  • Passive bar Y offset

    Vertical offset for the passive bar. Adjust to fit your HUD layout.

    slider0
Full menu

Mage Support

Zyra

Full Hanbot menu surface for Q, W seeds, E, R, manual plant routes, and drawings.

QWERmanual
Open full menu›

Core / Mode Priority

Global Zyra mode keys, prediction, spell lock, and combo order.

9 items

  • Enable Zyra logic

    Turns all Rift+ Zyra casts and drawings on or off. Disable it when you want Hanbot to load without champion automation.

    toggletrue

  • Prediction engine

    Selects the prediction backend used by skillshots. Change it if your current prediction feels too strict or too loose.

    dropdownNative HB

  • Combo key

    Manual combo fallback when orbwalker mode detection is unavailable. Adjust it to match your Hanbot hotkeys.

    keybindSpace

  • Harass key

    Manual poke fallback. Bind it to the key you hold for short trades.

    keybindC

  • Clear key

    Manual farm fallback for lane and jungle logic. Match this to your farming key.

    keybindV

  • Last-hit key

    Manual last-hit fallback for conservative minion securing. Use it when you want spell CS only.

    keybindX

  • Flee key

    Escape mode key. Use it to route movement and defensive spells toward the cursor.

    keybindZ

  • Spell lock ms

    Anti-spam delay after casts. Raise it if plants and spells fire too close together.

    slider160

  • Combo Mode

    Chooses combo order, either Q-W-R-E-W or E-W-R-Q-W. Pick the order that matches your engage style.

    dropdownQ-W-R-E-W

Q / Deadly Spines

Combo, harass, killsteal, farm, anti-gap, plant synergy, and prediction controls.

19 items

  • Use Q

    Allows Q in combo. Disable if you want E-first root setups only.

    toggletrue

  • Q combo range

    Maximum Q combo range. Lower it if edge Qs miss.

    slider800

  • Use when attack windup

    Allows Q during attack windup. Keep off if you prefer auto attacks to finish first.

    togglefalse

  • Wait for E animation to end

    Delays Q until E animation timing is safe. Keep enabled for cleaner chains.

    toggletrue

  • Auto Q CC target

    Casts Q on already controlled targets. Keep enabled for reliable hits.

    toggletrue

  • Prefer target in active R

    Prioritizes Q on targets inside tracked R area. Enable for teamfight burst.

    toggletrue

  • Use if also hits flower and enemy

    Requires Q to pair with plant and enemy proximity. Disable for raw Q poke.

    toggletrue

  • Use Q

    Allows Q harass. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Q harass mana %

    Minimum mana for Q poke. Raise it in long lanes.

    slider35

  • Use Q killsteal

    Casts Q when lethal. Disable for no automatic execute.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: use Q

    Uses Q on lane minions. Disable to control wave manually.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle clear: use Q

    Uses Q on jungle camps. Disable to save mana.

    toggletrue

  • Last-hit: use Q

    Uses Q for minion securing. Disable for manual CS.

    toggletrue

  • Q farm mana %

    Minimum mana for farm Q. Raise it to preserve combat mana.

    slider50

  • Q farm minions hit >=

    Minimum minions hit before clear Q. Raise it for efficiency.

    slider3

  • Farm check champion

    Blocks farm if an enemy champion is near when enabled. Use it for safer waveclear.

    togglefalse

  • Use Q on gapcloser

    Allows Q against gapclosing enemies. Default off because E handles most gap threats.

    togglefalse

  • Use when my HP <= %

    Health threshold for Q anti-gap. Lower it for emergency-only reactions.

    slider100

  • Slow Predictions

    Uses stricter Q prediction. Disable if Q is too conservative.

    toggletrue

W / Rampant Growth

Seed placement before and after Q or E in combo, harass, and farm.

14 items

  • Use W

    Allows W seed usage in combo. Disable for spell-only Zyra.

    toggletrue

  • W combo range

    Maximum W seed range. Lower it if seeds are placed too far forward.

    slider850

  • Pre-seed before Q/E

    Places W before Q or E when ready. Keep enabled for plant damage.

    toggletrue

  • Auto W after Q

    Places W after Q for plant follow-up. Keep enabled for QW combos.

    toggletrue

  • Auto W after E

    Places W after E for plant follow-up. Keep enabled for EW roots.

    toggletrue

  • Put 2 at a time

    Uses two seeds in combo when available. Disable to conserve seeds.

    toggletrue

  • Use W

    Allows W during harass. Disable if conserving seeds for all-ins.

    toggletrue

  • Harass W after Q

    Adds seed after harass Q. Disable for lower seed usage.

    toggletrue

  • Harass W after E

    Adds seed after harass E. Disable if saving seeds.

    toggletrue

  • Harass put 2 at a time

    Uses two seeds during harass. Turn off for conservative poke.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: use W

    Allows seeds during lane clear. Disable to save charges for champions.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle clear: use W

    Allows seeds on jungle camps. Disable to save cooldowns.

    toggletrue

  • Farm W after Q

    Adds W after farm Q. Disable for fewer plant spawns in waves.

    toggletrue

  • Farm W after E

    Adds W after farm E. Disable to conserve seeds.

    toggletrue

E / Grasping Roots

Combo, harass, killsteal, clear, anti-gap, interrupt, flee, and prediction controls.

19 items

  • Use E

    Allows E in combo. Disable if you want manual roots only.

    toggletrue

  • E combo range

    Maximum E combo range. Lower it if edge roots miss.

    slider1100

  • Use when attack windup

    Allows E during attack windup. Keep off if you prefer auto timing first.

    togglefalse

  • Auto E CC target

    Casts E on already controlled targets. Keep enabled for chain CC.

    toggletrue

  • Auto E if hit enemies >=

    Minimum enemies hit for automatic E. Raise it for teamfight roots only.

    slider2

  • Prefer target in active R

    Prioritizes E on targets in tracked R. Keep enabled for ultimate combos.

    toggletrue

  • Use E

    Allows E harass. Disable if root should be reserved.

    toggletrue

  • E harass mana %

    Minimum mana for E harass. Raise it to conserve mana.

    slider35

  • Use E killsteal

    Casts E if lethal. Disable for no automatic execute.

    toggletrue

  • Lane clear: use E

    Uses E on lane minions. Disable to save root.

    toggletrue

  • Jungle clear: use E

    Uses E on jungle camps. Disable to preserve cooldown.

    toggletrue

  • E farm mana %

    Minimum mana for farm E. Raise it for resource safety.

    slider50

  • E farm minions hit >=

    Minimum minions hit before clear E. Raise it for efficient roots.

    slider3

  • Use E on gapcloser

    Uses E against dash threats from generated rows. Keep enabled against engage.

    toggletrue

  • Ignore under-turret

    Skips anti-gap under turret when enabled. Turn on if reactions create bad turret casts.

    togglefalse

  • Only if gapcloses to me

    Requires dash endpoint near Zyra. Enable for stricter anti-gap.

    togglefalse

  • Use E

    Enables E interruption. Disable if you want no automatic interrupts.

    toggletrue

  • Use E

    Uses E while flee key is held. Keep enabled for escape roots.

    toggletrue

  • Accurate prediction

    Uses stricter E prediction. Disable if roots are overblocked.

    toggletrue

R / Stranglethorns

Combat, teamfight, CC, anti-gap, killsteal, semi-auto, and next-combo R controls.

18 items

  • Use R

    Allows R in combat or teamfights. Disable for manual ultimate only.

    toggletrue

  • R range

    Maximum R range. Lower it if ultimates are cast too far away.

    slider700

  • R Mode

    Chooses hit-count R or killable-only R. Use killable-only for conservative ultimates.

    dropdownIf hits X enemies

  • If hits >= X

    Minimum enemies hit by R. Raise it for teamfight-only casts.

    slider2

  • Auto R if hit enemies >=

    Automatic teamfight enemy count gate. Raise it for stricter auto R.

    slider3

  • Use if target HP <= %

    Target HP threshold for R. Lower it for execute-only behavior.

    slider40

  • Auto R CC target

    Uses R on controlled targets. Keep enabled for reliable knock-up setup.

    toggletrue

  • CC target HP <= %

    HP threshold for CC target R. Raise it for more CC follow-up ultimates.

    slider40

  • TS Mode

    Target selector mode for R. Change it if you prefer lowest HP, closest, or fastest kill targeting.

    dropdownFastest Kill

  • Use R on gapcloser

    Allows R anti-gap response. Keep enabled against hard engage.

    toggletrue

  • Use when my HP <= %

    HP threshold for R anti-gap. Lower it for emergency-only ultimates.

    slider50

  • Use R killsteal

    Uses R as an execute. Disable if you reserve ultimate for teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Kill minimum HP%

    Minimum target HP percent for kill R candidate checks. Adjust if R executes too early.

    slider7

  • Semi-R Key

    Semi-auto R key. Bind it for user controlled target selection.

    keybindT

  • Manual R

    Manual R key. Use it to cast directly on desired area or target.

    keybindA

  • Next Combo R

    Marks next E-root combo to include R. Use it to prepare a planned all-in.

    keybindMMB

  • Enable Next Combo R follow-up

    Allows the next combo R behavior after the key is used. Disable if you want the key as display only.

    toggletrue

  • Accurate prediction

    Uses stricter R prediction. Disable if R is too conservative.

    toggletrue

Manual Keys / RiftPlus Routes

Direct QW, EW, E, E Flash, and R route keys.

4 items

  • Manual E

    Manual E key. Bind it for user chosen root casts.

    keybindT

  • E Flash

    Manual E Flash route. Use only if you want advanced root extension.

    keybindG

  • Manual QW [Mouse Pos]

    Casts QW at mouse position. Bind for precise plant poke.

    keybindJ

  • Manual EW [Mouse Pos]

    Casts EW at mouse position. Bind for precise root plant setup.

    keybindL

Drawings

Range, damage, key, and state overlays that help users verify what the script is about to do.

13 items

  • Enable drawings

    Master switch for all on-screen Rift+ drawings. Turn it off if you want a cleaner screen or more FPS.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q range

    Shows the Q cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw W range

    Shows the W cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw E range

    Shows the E cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw R range

    Shows the R cast radius. Disable it if you already know the range or want less visual noise.

    toggletrue

  • Draw damage

    Shows estimated damage on health bars when supported. Turn it off if damage overlays clutter teamfights.

    toggletrue

  • Damage drawing transparency

    Controls how visible damage overlays are. Lower it for subtle bars, raise it for clearer kill checks.

    slider155

  • Use colorful circle

    Uses colored spell circles. Disable for simpler visuals.

    toggletrue

  • Draw keys

    Shows key status. Enable while learning manual routes.

    togglefalse

  • Draw Seeds

    Shows tracked seed positions. Keep enabled for plant planning.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Flowers End Time

    Shows remaining plant lifetime. Disable if plant timers clutter the screen.

    toggletrue

  • Draw Q Flowers Attack Range

    Shows Q plant attack ranges. Enable when tuning plant placement.

    togglefalse

  • Draw E Flowers Attack Range

    Shows E plant attack ranges. Enable when tuning root plants.

    togglefalse
